notes: Fullscreen background now fills the whole screen (was hardcoded to 1920x1080 → black gutter on ultrawide). Profile avatar is now the actual in-game ship — chevron triangle, energy ring, glow halo, floor pedestal. time_alive field exists now, so all menu animations actually move (sidebar pulse, currency glyphs, top-bar wave, ship aim sweep).
launcher_notes: Hardened self-update flow on Windows. Manifest now served from pulsewavegame.com with 30s cache.
